name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
In stock!!️
Three-compartment matte series in matte pink, featuring brand new diamond quilting and high-quality calfskin embossing. Paired with matte hardware, it is versatile and elegant, suitable for both casual and chic looks. The most unique three-compartment Lady of the season, a cool girl's exclusive bag 🥳
size: 17cm
